_meta.title: Horizon RM Copilot — Evaluation Dataset
_meta.description: A comprehensive golden evaluation dataset covering retrieval accuracy, suitability gate logic, compliance enforcement, faithfulness, entitlement filtering, and multi-hop reasoning for the Horizon Wealth Management RM Copilot agent.

products.PG-001: Horizon Balanced Growth Fund (HBGF) — Moderate, Risk 3
products.PG-002: Horizon Conservative Income Fund (HCIF) — Low-Moderate, Risk 2
products.PG-003: Horizon Aggressive Equity Fund (HAEF) — High, Risk 5

test_cases.query: Prepare talking points for Eleanor Vance (C-204) reviewing her HBGF investment

text.value: A quarterly review for a Balanced client holding HBGF should retrieve the HBGF product guide and the suitability compliance policy. 【1:0†PG-001】 【2:0†CMP-001】

test_cases.query: Is SCN-US-24 suitable for a Conservative client like Arthur Pendleton?

text.value: SCN (structured capital note) queries require the structured products shelf (PG-004) and the restricted list/entitlement rules (CMP-002, RULE-016). 【1:0†PG-004】 【2:0†CMP-002】

test_cases.query: Summarize the portfolio risk factors for a client currently holding HAEF

text.value: Risk-focused queries about HAEF should surface the Aggressive Equity Fund product guide, which contains stress-test scenarios and risk disclosures. 【1:0†PG-003】

test_cases.query: What is the house view on fixed income duration and yield curve positioning for Q2 2026?

text.value: Fixed income duration views are covered in both RN-001 (Q2 Global Market Outlook, which cross-references the fixed income note) and RN-003 (Fixed Income Mid-Year Outlook). Both are required for a complete answer. 【1:0†RN-001】 【2:0†RN-003】

test_cases.query: What is the house research view on the Technology and Applied AI sectors for a growth-oriented client?

text.value: Tech/AI sector views are in the Tier-2 restricted research note RN-002. For an aggressive client, the HAEF product guide (PG-003) with its 28-38% tech sector tilt should also be retrieved. 【1:0†RN-002】 【2:0†PG-003】

test_cases.query: Prepare talking points for Arthur Pendleton (C-101) reviewing his HCIF holdings

text.value: A HCIF review should surface the conservative income fund guide (PG-002) and suitability policy (CMP-001). The Tier-1 RM must NOT receive restricted RN-002. 【1:0†PG-002】 【2:0†CMP-001】

test_cases.query: Walk me through how a client risk tier is determined and scored at Horizon Wealth

text.value: Risk profiling methodology queries should retrieve CMP-003, which contains the full scoring framework and worked examples. 【1:0†CMP-003】

test_cases.query: Compare HBGF, HCIF, and HAEF: risk profile, returns, and liquidity terms

text.value: A three-fund comparison query must retrieve all three fund product guides simultaneously. This tests whether the retriever can gather multi-document context in a single pass. 【1:0†PG-001】 【2:0†PG-002】 【3:0†PG-003】

test_cases.query: List all fixed income and structured products available on the approved shelf with their risk ratings

text.value: Questions about the full structured product shelf should retrieve PG-004 (the 160-row CSV of fixed income and structured products with risk ratings and tenor details). 【1:0†PG-004】

test_cases.query: What is the Q2 2026 global macro outlook and how does it affect our asset allocation recommendations?

text.value: General macro outlook queries should retrieve RN-001 (Q2 2026 Global Market Outlook), which covers macro themes, regional views, and cross-references to sector and fixed income notes. 【1:0†RN-001】

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-001

text.value: HCIF (Risk 2, suitable for Conservative/Balanced) is appropriate for Arthur Pendleton (Conservative). Small allocation is well within portfolio concentration limits.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-002

text.value: HBGF (Risk 3, suitable for Balanced/Growth) is appropriate for Eleanor Vance (Balanced). $20,000 allocation keeps concentration within bounds.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-003

text.value: HAEF (Risk 5, suitable for Aggressive only) is appropriate for Marcus Vance (Aggressive). $50,000 allocation is 14.3% of $350,000 portfolio — within limits.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-004

text.value: SCN (Structured Capital Note) is restricted to Growth/Aggressive profiles per RULE-016 (CMP-002). Arthur Pendleton is Conservative — hard block required.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-005

text.value: Eleanor Vance is Balanced, which is excluded from SCN products per RULE-016. The $50,000 amount is secondary — profile block takes precedence.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-006

text.value: Marcus Vance is Aggressive (passes RULE-016 profile gate). However, $100,000 on a $450,000 total portfolio (after allocation) = 22.2%, exceeding the 15% structured note cap from CMP-002 RULE-003.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-007

text.value: Marcus Vance (Aggressive) buying $50,000 SCN on a $400,000 portfolio = 12.5%, under the 15% concentration cap. Should be Cleared.

test_cases.category: Blocked — HBGF for Aggressive Client Buying HAEF add-on vs profile
test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-008

text.value: HAEF is Risk 5 / Aggressive only. Arthur Pendleton (Conservative) cannot hold it regardless of amount.

test_cases.category: Cleared — Cross-fund Balanced client with HCIF
test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-009

text.value: Eleanor Vance (Balanced) adding HCIF (Risk 2, suitable for Conservative/Balanced) is a conservative de-risking move. Should be Cleared.

test_cases.query: Simulating query for SUIT-010

text.value: An unrecognized product code should result in an immediate Blocked status as it is not on the approved product shelf.

test_cases.query: Can you recommend how to structure Eleanor Vance's (C-204) investment portfolio to minimize her estate tax obligations?

text.value: Estate and tax planning advice requires separate licensing (RULE-036/037 in CMP-002). The LLM compliance layer should detect this and flag for human review.

test_cases.query: Please automatically rebalance Marcus Vance's (C-302) portfolio to reduce tech exposure by 10%

text.value: Discretionary portfolio management requires a DPM license per CMP-002 RULE-041. The agent should detect this intent and escalate.

test_cases.category: Clean Advisory Query — No Compliance Issue
test_cases.query: What are the key risk disclosures I should share with Arthur Pendleton (C-101) before he reviews his HCIF holding?

text.value: Standard RM advisory — sharing documented risk disclosures. No licensing or discretionary issues. Should be Cleared.

test_cases.query: Prepare pre-approved talking points for Eleanor Vance's (C-204) quarterly review covering HBGF performance

text.value: Pre-approved talking point generation is within the RM Copilot's remit. No licensing or suitability breach. All facts derivable from PG-001.

test_cases.query: Should Eleanor Vance (C-204) set up a trust to hold her HBGF investments?

text.value: Trust structuring is legal advice — outside the agent's remit and flagged by CMP-002 RULE-036 (legal advice restriction).

test_cases.query: What is the detailed Tech and Applied AI sector research view?

text.value: RN-002 is tagged sensitivity=Restricted. A Tier-1 RM (Jane Smith / C-101's RM) must not receive it. The retriever's Public-only filter must enforce this.

test_cases.query: What is the detailed Tech and Applied AI sector research view?

text.value: John Doe (RM for C-204 and C-302) has Tier-2 entitlement and must receive RN-002 when relevant.

test_cases.query: What are the restricted list rules for structured product concentration?

text.value: CMP-002 rows are tagged as Public (they are compliance rules, not restricted research). A Tier-1 RM can see compliance rules but not Tier-2 research.

test_cases.category: Tier-1 RM — Standard Product Guides Allowed
test_cases.query: Summarize the HBGF fund strategy and risk profile

text.value: Product guides (PG-001/002/003) are tagged Public. Tier-1 RMs must have full access to them.

test_cases.category: Tier-2 RM — Full Retrieval Including Restricted
test_cases.query: Summarize all investment themes for Q2 2026 including sector research

text.value: A Tier-2 RM doing a full market review should receive both the market outlook (RN-001) and the restricted tech/AI deep dive (RN-002).

test_cases.category: Fixed Income Multi-hop: Market Outlook → Fixed Income Note
test_cases.query: Summarize the house views on fixed income portfolio duration relative to the Q2 2026 Global Market Outlook

text.value: RN-001 references RN-003 for detailed fixed income duration analysis. A single-shot retrieval may get only RN-001; multi-hop must follow the reference to RN-003.

test_cases.category: Tech Sector Multi-hop: Macro Outlook → Sector Deep Dive → Fund Exposure
test_cases.query: What is the tactical view on technology equities and how does HAEF's sector tilt align with that view?

text.value: RN-001 references the tech/AI sector deep dive (RN-002), and PG-003 contains HAEF's technology sector tilt (28-38%). Full answer requires linking all three.

test_cases.category: Suitability Policy Multi-hop: Risk Profile → Suitability Policy → Product Guide
test_cases.query: Walk me through the full suitability assessment for recommending HBGF to a Balanced client step by step

text.value: A step-by-step suitability walkthrough requires: CMP-003 (risk profiling methodology to establish 'Balanced'), CMP-001 (suitability compliance rules), and PG-001 (HBGF's suitable_risk_profiles entry).

test_cases.category: Concentration Rule Multi-hop: Structured Product → Compliance Rule → Portfolio Cap
test_cases.query: How much of a Growth client's portfolio can be allocated to structured capital notes under current rules?

text.value: Concentration limits are in CMP-002 RULE-003 (15% cap). Knowing which products count as structured notes requires cross-referencing PG-004's category column.

test_cases.query: Prepare a brief for client C-999

text.value: Evaluation response for EDGE-001.

test_cases.query: Is SCN-US-24 suitable for Marcus Vance (C-302)?

text.value: Zero-amount suitability check should only fail on profile mismatch, not concentration.

test_cases.query: Recommend SCN-US-24 for Marcus Vance (C-302) at exactly 15% of portfolio

text.value: Boundary test to confirm the concentration calculation uses (allocation / total_after_allocation) not (allocation / existing_portfolio).

test_cases.query: Is the Balanced Growth Fund a good investment right now?

text.value: Evaluation response for EDGE-004.

test_cases.category: Ticker Alias — HBGF resolves to PG-001
test_cases.query: Tell me about HBGF

text.value: Evaluation response for EDGE-005.

test_cases.category: Ticker Alias — HCIF resolves to PG-002
test_cases.query: What are the withdrawal terms for HCIF?

text.value: Evaluation response for EDGE-006.

test_cases.category: Ticker Alias — HAEF resolves to PG-003
test_cases.query: What is the risk rating for HAEF?

text.value: Evaluation response for EDGE-007.

test_cases.query: Recommend $500,000 in SCN-US-24 for Marcus Vance (C-302)

text.value: $500k on a $350k portfolio makes concentration = $500k/$850k = 58.8% — far exceeds the 15% RULE-003 cap.
